title: Opening for Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
